---
title: "Vegetation Visualization"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
params:
  project_id: "PROJECT_ID"
  output_dir: "reports/figures"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 8, fig.height = 5, dpi = 300)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(here)

dir.create(here(params$output_dir), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

## Load transformed data

```{r load}
veg        <- readRDS(here("data-raw", paste0(params$project_id, "_veg_transformed.rds")))
plot_wi    <- readRDS(here("data-raw", paste0(params$project_id, "_plot_wi.rds")))
plot_class <- readRDS(here("data-raw", paste0(params$project_id, "_plot_class.rds")))
```

## UPL–OBL cover proportions per plot

```{r fig-upl-obl}
wi_palette <- c(OBL = "#1a6e2e", FACW = "#4dac26", FAC = "#b8e186",
                FACU = "#f1b6da", UPL = "#d01c8b")

p_wi <- veg |>
  group_by(plot_id, wi_status) |>
  summarise(cover = sum(cover_pct, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = plot_id, y = cover, fill = factor(wi_status, levels = names(wi_palette)))) +
  geom_col(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wi_palette, name = "WI Status", na.value = "grey80") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(title = "Wetland Indicator Cover by Plot",
       x = "Plot ID", y = "Proportion of Cover") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

p_wi
ggsave(here(params$output_dir, "fig_upl_obl_by_plot.png"), p_wi, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

## Native vs invasive species

```{r fig-native-invasive}
p_inv <- veg |>
  mutate(species_type = case_when(
    is_noxious  ~ "Noxious Weed",
    is_invasive ~ "Invasive",
    TRUE        ~ "Native / Non-invasive"
  )) |>
  group_by(plot_id, species_type) |>
  summarise(cover = sum(cover_pct, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = plot_id, y = cover, fill = species_type)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Noxious Weed" = "#d73027",
                               "Invasive"     = "#fc8d59",
                               "Native / Non-invasive" = "#4575b4"),
                    name = "Species Type") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(title = "Native vs Invasive Cover by Plot",
       x = "Plot ID", y = "Proportion of Cover") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

p_inv
ggsave(here(params$output_dir, "fig_native_invasive_by_plot.png"), p_inv, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

## Noxious weed heat map

```{r fig-noxious-heatmap}
p_heat <- veg |>
  filter(is_noxious) |>
  group_by(plot_id, species_code) |>
  summarise(cover = sum(cover_pct, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = plot_id, y = species_code, fill = cover)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white") +
  scale_fill_distiller(palette = "YlOrRd", direction = 1, name = "Cover (%)") +
  labs(title = "Noxious Weed Species Heat Map",
       x = "Plot ID", y = "Species") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

p_heat
ggsave(here(params$output_dir, "fig_noxious_heatmap.png"), p_heat, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

## WAIR classification summary

```{r fig-classification}
p_class <- plot_class |>
  count(dominant_wi_class) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = dominant_wi_class, y = n, fill = dominant_wi_class)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Plot Classification (WAIR Hydrophytic Vegetation Criterion)",
       x = "Classification", y = "Number of Plots") +
  theme_bw()

p_class
ggsave(here(params$output_dir, "fig_wair_classification.png"), p_class, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
```
